author: OktZ
content: Removed v1 crossbridge polling crate end-to-end (crate, workspace member, default.nix postInstall, mainProgram, helper scripts, empty script/ dir, README references). Bundled the companion #42 skill rewrite so SKILL.md now invokes crossbridge-client submit/answer/peers and uses v2 xb:* labels. CHANGELOG Removed entries added; cargo test/clippy/fmt clean. Note: an unrelated .crosslink/hook-config.json normalization remains uncommitted in the worktree — appears to be crosslink agent-init cleanup, not part of this issue.
